SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.model

Class ImageAsset

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.model.ImageAsset
public class ImageAsset extends Object
Metadata record for an uploaded image resource such as an event poster.

Links uploaded media to its organizer owner and optionally to a specific event. Used by admin moderation and image-cleanup flows.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    ImageAsset()
    Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

  • Constructor Details

    • ImageAsset

      public ImageAsset()
      Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

    • ImageAsset

      public ImageAsset(String imageId, String ownerUid, String eventId, String storagePath, long uploadedAtMillis)
      Constructs a new ImageAsset with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      imageId - Unique identifier for the image.
      ownerUid - UID of the user who uploaded the image.
      eventId - Optional UID of the event associated with this image.
      storagePath - Path or URL where the image is stored in Firebase Storage.
      uploadedAtMillis - Time when the image was uploaded in epoch milliseconds.

  • Method Details

      The unique identifier for the image.

      Returns:
      Optional UID of the event associated with this image.

      Parameters:
      eventId - Optional UID of the event associated with this image.
